reasons: DSR prob=0.001 < 0.20 -> strong signal: no alpha (-25)
0 factors pass BH-FDR q=0.10 (pooled) -> no alpha in universe (-15)
Parameter scan shows plateau -> insensitive to parameter choice, not overfit (+10)
Look-ahead test PASS -> no look-ahead bias, results trustworthy (+0)
Strongest regime t-stat=4.56 >= 4.0 -> local regime alpha significant (+15)
verdict_summary: REJECT this signal. Data leakage detected: naive Sharpe=0.85 vs honest Sharpe=-0.99. The backtest was exploiting future information.

regime_conditional_finding.note: CMC F&G shows regime-conditional alpha exploitable in CHOP_NEUTRAL regime
regime_conditional_finding.interpretation: Mean-reversion in choppy neutral sentiment is the only statistically significant sub-regime. Not yet robust enough for standalone deployment.
